author: Alexandre Stanislawski
subject: v1.11.0
body: # [1.11.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.10.5...v1.11.0) (2017-02-12) ### Features * **analytics-widget:** add a new parameter pushInitialSearch (#1963) ([d777997](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/d777997)) * **custom client:** allows to provide a custom JS client instance (#1948) ([cce4f2e](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/cce4f2e)) * **InfiniteHits:** add new widget ([2d77e4b](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/2d77e4b))
